text:
Totalling up (1), (2) and (3) what we get — 2945-4 (D)
Adding up (C) and (D) what we get =3279-50
Dividing this by 60 we get Ghatis = 54-40
This figure viz. 54 G.-40 P. is the exact time of Niseka on
Tuesday/Wednesday night. The exact longitude of the Sun
for this time is 5s-290-33'-48* and that of the Moon 0t-22®-I7'-12*.
Let me give another example of birth and copulation :
Female born at 6-30 A.M. on 1952-3-6. Ascendant =
105-23o-51'-26.* Mtxm — 2s-I9o-20'-30*, Sim~ lCs-22e-13'-6'.
The reported time of copulation is about midnight on 1951-6-2.
Lagna= 10*-7o-40'-0". Moon-O^TM'-Sl'.
If we apply the principles of Sepharial to the data of birth
in order to get the time of conception, the latter would take
place five days earlier than the one given above and the Moon
would be in Aquarius. On the other hand, if we apply the
second method, the conception should have taken place on
Tuesday the 12th June 1951. On that day Moon is in Leo.
